new_value: {"notes":"Official inventory: classic T-Echo photo-marked U1.0 (2021-3-26), revision-blank schematic dated 2021-6-23; T-Echo Plus reuses core pinout with separate add-on revisions; T-Echo-Lite_V1.0 dated 2024-12-06; T-Echo-Card_V1.0 dated 2025-10-11. GNSS variants: classic schematic/early firmware covers Air530 and L76K; current classic/Plus use L76K; Lite/Card identify L76K with L76KB-A58 manual."}
